1:2241.name: In most digital products, engagement is everything. In clinical research, engagement must not distort behaviour. We tested common engagement techniques — progress rings, streaks, compliance scores — and rejected them all. They introduced emotional pressure, reward-seeking, or bias that could compromise data integrity. Instead, we practiced invisible encouragement. After completing a task or training, users receive a small, passive badge — no sound, no distracting animation, no complex interaction. Just a quiet signal of closure: thank you, you’re done!
1:2241.characters: In most digital products, engagement is everything. In clinical research, engagement must not distort behaviour. We tested common engagement techniques — progress rings, streaks, compliance scores — and rejected them all. They introduced emotional pressure, reward-seeking, or bias that could compromise data integrity. Instead, we practiced invisible encouragement. After completing a task or training, users receive a small, passive badge — no sound, no distracting animation, no complex interaction. Just a quiet signal of closure: thank you, you’re done!

1:2208.name: One unified platform now powers five global festival brands.
1:2208.characters: One unified platform now powers five global festival brands.

1:2194.name: What began as a redesign of a single product evolved into a resilient digital foundation for the entire Lions brand family. The architecture was robust enough to be partially integrated by Money 20/20, a fintech brand in an entirely different vertical. Beyond the metrics, the digital experience finally reflects the prestige of the event it serves.
1:2194.characters: What began as a redesign of a single product evolved into a resilient digital foundation for the entire Lions brand family. The architecture was robust enough to be partially integrated by Money 20/20, a fintech brand in an entirely different vertical. Beyond the metrics, the digital experience finally reflects the prestige of the event it serves.

1:2188.name: I redesigned the dashboard as a "Single Pane of Glass" featuring clear prioritization and inline scoring. Jurors completed reviews 25% faster. We did not rush the experience; we simply removed every obstacle between the judge and the creative work.
1:2188.characters: I redesigned the dashboard as a "Single Pane of Glass" featuring clear prioritization and inline scoring. Jurors completed reviews 25% faster. We did not rush the experience; we simply removed every obstacle between the judge and the creative work.

1:2180.name: Rather than compromise the UI, we designed distinct flows for each archetype, unified by a shared underlying component system. This led to a 35% acceleration in corporate transaction closure and an 18% reduction in abandonment. This same architecture was later deployed across Dubai Lynx, Spikes Asia, and Eurobest with minimal rework.
1:2180.characters: Rather than compromise the UI, we designed distinct flows for each archetype, unified by a shared underlying component system. This led to a 35% acceleration in corporate transaction closure and an 18% reduction in abandonment. This same architecture was later deployed across Dubai Lynx, Spikes Asia, and Eurobest with minimal rework.

1:2176.name: Ticketing at this scale is an account management problem sitting inside a consumer interface. Agencies represent 60% of revenue and require bulk purchasing, attendee rostering, and ancillary service layering for hotels and VIP access.
1:2176.characters: Ticketing at this scale is an account management problem sitting inside a consumer interface. Agencies represent 60% of revenue and require bulk purchasing, attendee rostering, and ancillary service layering for hotels and VIP access.

1:2171.name: We collapsed these into a single experience and introduced a Timeline Layer. This visual conflict-resolution tool allowed delegates to see session overlaps in real time and make deliberate trade-offs. Combined with a robust Save and Sync feature, the transition from desktop planning to on-site mobile execution became seamless.
1:2171.characters: We collapsed these into a single experience and introduced a Timeline Layer. This visual conflict-resolution tool allowed delegates to see session overlaps in real time and make deliberate trade-offs. Combined with a robust Save and Sync feature, the transition from desktop planning to on-site mobile execution became seamless.

1:2141.name: Reduced checkout abandonment by 18%, accelerated corporate transaction closure by 35%, and cut the design-to-development cycle by 40% through a unified Design System — now powering 5 global festival brands.
1:2141.characters: Reduced checkout abandonment by 18%, accelerated corporate transaction closure by 35%, and cut the design-to-development cycle by 40% through a unified Design System — now powering 5 global festival brands.

1:2129.name: The Cannes Lions digital estate was a collection of disconnected tools, each built in isolation with its own UX debt. For delegates navigating a five-day global event, constant context-switching produced a digital experience that fundamentally undermined the prestige of the brand.
1:2129.characters: The Cannes Lions digital estate was a collection of disconnected tools, each built in isolation with its own UX debt. For delegates navigating a five-day global event, constant context-switching produced a digital experience that fundamentally undermined the prestige of the brand.

1:2115.name: I led the design of a research-driven eCOA platform built on emotional neutrality as a clinical requirement and has to serve users aged 14 to 90 across 250+ languages with zero behavioural nudging.
1:2115.characters: I led the design of a research-driven eCOA platform built on emotional neutrality as a clinical requirement and has to serve users aged 14 to 90 across 250+ languages with zero behavioural nudging.

1:2109.name: 30% of clinical trial participants drop out before completion. Re-recruiting a single patient costs $19,000. The tools they used daily were never designed for them.

1:2101.name: Reduced checkout abandonment by 18%, accelerated corporate transaction closure by 35%, and cut the design-to-development cycle by 40% through a unified Design System — now powering 5 global festival brands.

1:2095.name: I led product design across a full-scale platform unification — architecting a single system serving four distinct user archetypes: Delegates, Agencies, Jurors, and Partners. Built on a white-label foundation, the same architecture was designed to power sister festivals across Dubai, Singapore, and Europe with minimal rework.

1:2008.name: The Engagement Playbook (and Why We Set It Aside)
1:2008.characters: The Engagement Playbook (and Why We Set It Aside)

1:1914.name: Between 2017 and 2020, the Cannes Lions International Festival of Creativity underwent a full-scale digital transformation. As Product Design Lead, I guided this evolution—redesigning the platform that powers the world’s most prestigious celebration of creativity. The digital estate was a collection of disconnected tools. Each was built in isolation, carrying its own logic and UX debt. For delegates navigating a five-day global event, this meant constant context-switching and a digital experience that fundamentally undermined the prestige of the brand.
1:1914.characters: Between 2017 and 2020, the Cannes Lions International Festival of Creativity underwent a full-scale digital transformation. Each was built in isolation, carrying its own logic and UX debt. For delegates navigating a five-day global event, this meant constant context-switching and a digital experience that fundamentally undermined the prestige of the brand.

45:10020.name: In most digital products, engagement is everything. In clinical research, engagement must not distort behaviour. We tested common engagement techniques — progress rings, streaks, compliance scores — and rejected them all. They introduced emotional pressure, reward-seeking, or bias that could compromise data integrity. Instead, we practiced invisible encouragement. After completing a task or training, users receive a small, passive badge — no sound, no distracting animation, no complex interaction. Just a quiet signal of closure: thank you, you’re done!

1:2160.name: I anchored the process in a Double Diamond framework, but the real discipline was resisting the urge to jump to visual solutions. We ran friction analyses across live festival cycles, audited manual staff workflows, and mapped behavioral data to identify exactly where the system was failing.

1:2168.characters: The festival programme is the most used and was previously the most broken part of the platform. Three soloed verticals (Explore, Programme, and Speakers) forced users to reconcile information across disparate interfaces.

1:1972.name: Reduced checkout abandonment by 18% and optimized high-value corporate workflows.
1:1972.characters: Reduced checkout abandonment by 18% and optimized high-value corporate workflows.

1:1976.name: One unified platform now powers five global festival brands.
1:1976.characters: One unified platform now powers five global festival brands.

45:9880.name: Reduced checkout abandonment by 18%, accelerated corporate transaction closure by 35%, and cut the design-to-development cycle by 40% through a unified Design System — now powering 5 global festival brands.
45:9880.characters: Reduced checkout abandonment by 18%, accelerated corporate transaction closure by 35%, and cut the design-to-development cycle by 40% through a unified Design System — now powering 5 global festival brands.

45:9973.name: What began as a redesign of a single product evolved into a resilient digital foundation for the entire Lions brand family. The architecture was robust enough to be partially integrated by Money 20/20, a fintech brand in an entirely different vertical. Beyond the metrics, the digital experience finally reflects the prestige of the event it serves.
45:9973.characters: What began as a redesign of a single product evolved into a resilient digital foundation for the entire Lions brand family. The architecture was robust enough to be partially integrated by Money 20/20, a fintech brand in an entirely different vertical. Beyond the metrics, the digital experience finally reflects the prestige of the event it serves.

1:1956.name: I redesigned the dashboard as a "Single Pane of Glass" featuring clear prioritization and inline scoring. Jurors completed reviews 25% faster. We did not rush the experience; we simply removed every obstacle between the judge and the creative work.
1:1956.characters: I redesigned the dashboard as a "Single Pane of Glass" featuring clear prioritization and inline scoring. Jurors completed reviews 25% faster. We did not rush the experience; we simply removed every obstacle between the judge and the creative work.

45:9900.name: Completion rates rose, trial abandonment dropped, and study setup time compressed, while participants from rural Poland to urban Nigeria felt the platform was built for them.
45:9900.characters: Completion rates rose, trial abandonment dropped, and study setup time compressed, while participants from rural Poland to urban Nigeria felt the platform was built for them.

1:1936.name: We collapsed these into a single experience and introduced a Timeline Layer. This visual conflict-resolution tool allowed delegates to see session overlaps in real time and make deliberate trade-offs. Combined with a robust Save and Sync feature, the transition from desktop planning to on-site mobile execution became seamless.
1:1936.characters: We collapsed these into a single experience and introduced a Timeline Layer. This visual conflict-resolution tool allowed delegates to see session overlaps in real time and make deliberate trade-offs. Combined with a robust Save and Sync feature, the transition from desktop planning to on-site mobile execution became seamless.

1:1968.name: The new Design System cut the design-to-development cycle by 40%, compounding in value with every new festival deployment.
1:1968.characters: The new Design System cut the design-to-development cycle by 40%, compounding in value with every new festival deployment.
